findings.note: Significance rests on a single GEODE fixture plus a measured-but-indirect intractability argument; a NeurIPS reviewer would ask for a converged head-to-head and/or a sweep across bend radii/bands.
'computationally intractable' is shown against single-process Meep on one instance; distributed/GPU FDTD would move the RAM wall. Scope the categorical claim.
Rendered figures are clean and measured-vs-projected is well distinguished, but three captions carry stale placeholder text.
